name: Turso
description: Monitor Turso edge SQLite databases for infrastructure inventory and access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Turso at https://turso.tech
2. Go to Settings → API Tokens
3. Create a new API token
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Turso Settings → API Tokens

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists Turso organizations and databases for edge database infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Turso organization members and their database access
